symbols.name: EntityFrameworkPermissionProvider
symbols.summary: Provides entity permission functionality using Entity Framework Core as the storage mechanism.
symbols.remarks: Initializes a new instance of the BridgingIT.DevKit.Infrastructure.EntityFramework.EntityFrameworkPermissionProvider%601 class.

syntax.content: public class EntityFrameworkPermissionProvider : IEntityPermissionProvider where TContext : DbContext, IEntityPermissionContext
public EntityFrameworkPermissionProvider(ILoggerFactory loggerFactory, IServiceProvider serviceProvider, ICacheProvider cacheProvider = null, EntityPermissionOptions options = null)

symbols.name: HasPermissionAsync(string, string[], string, object, string, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Checks if a user has a specific permission for an entity, either directly or through their roles.

syntax.content: public Task HasPermissionAsync(string userId, string[] roles, string entityType, object entityId, string permission, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: The ID of the user.
The roles assigned to the user.
The type of the entity.
The ID of the specific entity.
The permission to check.
Token to monitor for cancellation requests.

returns.description: True if the user has the permission, false otherwise.

parameters.description: The ID of the user.
The roles assigned to the user.
The type of the entity.
The ID of the specific entity.
The permission to check.
Token to monitor for cancellation requests.

returns.description: True if the user has the permission, false otherwise.

symbols.summary: Checks if a user has a wildcard permission (no id) for all entities of a specific type.
